title: Unknown coverage benchmark seed
prompt: Build a local project brain for a sparse utility module and report known-unknown coverage alongside component, flow, and evidence metrics.

files.contents:
# Sparse utility

This fixture intentionally has limited local signals.

pass: The benchmark-ready JSON preserves known-unknown items as structured local facts.
Unknown coverage is measured even when flow coverage is sparse.
The fixture runs without provider credentials.
fail: Unknowns are silently dropped from research metrics.
The output depends on network or credential state.
Sparse flow coverage is reported as a crash instead of measured coverage.
